title: IIM Lucknow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online For Senior Research Associate / Research Associate post
short_info: The latest Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Senior Research Associate / Research Associate posts! Published on 8 May 2026 at IIM Lucknow Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing a Ph.D. or Master’s degree in Statistics, Management (specialization in statistics), or a relevant field with research experience can apply online from 8 May 2026 to 31 May 2026. Find all details about the IIM Lucknow Senior Research Associate / Research Associate new vacancy 2026, including e

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. or Master's degree in Statistics or Management
qualification.details: Ph.D. or Master's degree in Statistics or Management (with specialization in statistics) or a relevant field from a reputed institute/university with First Class performance throughout. At least one research publication in a peer-reviewed journal (national or international). Minimum 3 years research experience for Senior Research Associate and 2 years for Research Associate. Desirable: Proficiency in R/MATLAB/Python for statistical modeling and data analysis.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Lucknow Senior Research Associate / Research Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Lucknow to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Lucknow Senior Research Associate / Research Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIM Lucknow Senior Research Associate / Research Associate positions is 31st May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Senior Research Associate / Research Associate in the Indian Institute of Management Lucknow recruitment drive for 2026. This is a single opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. or Master's degree in Statistics or Management (specialization in statistics) or a relevant field from a reputed institute with a First Class academic record. Research publication and experience are also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Research Associate / Research Associate positions will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 50,000/- to Rs. 70,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIM Lucknow Senior Research Associate / Research Associate Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these roles?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial scrutiny of applications received. Candidates who are shortlisted based on their applications will then be invited for an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Senior Research Associate / Research Associate at IIM Lucknow are contractual in nature. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as per the contract agreement.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIM Lucknow located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 226013.

faq.question: Q10. What are the desirable skills for the candidates?
faq.answer: Proficiency in R, MATLAB, or Python for statistical modeling and data analysis is considered a desirable skill for candidates applying for these research associate positions.
